input:
Bug report (moq.analyzers issue #1080): .git/config and .git/packed-refs get corrupted every session. The .git/config remote origin URL gets wrapped in angle brackets:

```
url = <https://github.com/rjmurillo/moq.analyzers>
```

Git then rejects with 'fatal: protocol "<https" is not supported'. Manual repair required before every git operation. The user wants the root cause and a permanent fix, not just a workaround. What hypothesis ranking and what specific evidence would falsify or confirm each?
